function.name: pnf_handle_pnf_start_request
function.signature: void pnf_handle_pnf_start_request(pnf_t* pnf, void *pRecvMsg, int recvMsgLen)

bug.description: socket resource leak where a socket is not closed after use or on error

prompt:
There is a socket resource leak where a socket is not closed after use or on error downstream of function pnf_handle_pnf_start_request in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/pnf subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/pnf/src/pnf.c:303.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
